channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TRANSRAILL] Transrail Lighting Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Insiders
item.description:
Transrail Lighting Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for insiders, designated persons, and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from 1st April, 2026 till the conclusion of 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the code of conduct adopted by the Company pursuant to SEBI (Prohibition of Insiders Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Transrail Lighting Ltd announces closure of trading window for insiders and designated persons.
  • The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the year ended 31st March, 2026.
  • This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insiders Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • Insiders, designated persons, and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during the aforesaid period.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Transrail Lighting Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [STYLEBAAZA] Baazar Style Retail Ltd. Pays ₹1,30,000 as Settlement Fee under Legal Metrology Act, 2009
item.description:
Baazar Style Retail Ltd., formerly known as Baazar Style Retail Pvt. Ltd., has paid a settlement fee of ₹1,30,000 under the Legal Metrology Act, 2009. The order to pay this amount was received on March 30, 2026, from the Office of the Senior Inspector of Legal Metrology, Noorullah Road, Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh. The company has complied with the order and paid the settlement fee. There is no material financial impact on the Company due to this violation.

  • Baazar Style Retail Ltd. pays ₹1,30,000 as settlement fee under the Legal Metrology Act, 2009
  • The order was received on March 30, 2026
  • Company has complied with the order and paid the settlement fee
  • The violation was due to irregularities found in the product labelling
  • No material financial impact on the Company due to this violation

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Baazar Style Retail Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [PERSISTENT] Persistent Systems Ranked Among India's Most Valuable Brands in Kantar BrandZ 2025 with $2.9 Billion Brand Valuation
item.description:
Persistent Systems, a global leader in Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization, has been included in the Kantar BrandZ India Most Valuable Brands 2025 ranking with a brand valuation of $2.9 billion. The Company ranked 6th in the Business Technology and Services category and 42nd overall, highlighting the strategic relevance of engineering-led technology partners as enterprises accelerate AI adoption and large-scale digital transformation. The ranking demonstrates Persistent’s growing influence in AI-driven enterprise transformation and its growing credibility as a strategic technology partner for global enterprises.

  • Persistent Systems ranked among India's most valuable brands in Kantar BrandZ 2025 with $2.9 billion brand valuation
  • Ranked 6th in the Business Technology and Services category
  • Highlights the strategic relevance of engineering-led technology partners
  • Demonstrates Persistent’s growing influence in AI-driven enterprise transformation
  • Signals long-term client trust, strong execution capability and deep engineering expertise

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PERSISTENT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [EXPLEOSOL] Expleo Solutions Ltd Closes Trading Window Till 48 Hours After Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Expleo Solutions Limited has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in shares of the company. The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026, and will remain in force until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Code of Conduct to regulate, monitor, and report trading by insiders of the company and pursuant to SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, as amended from time to time, read with NSE Circular number NSE/CML/2019/11 dated April 02, 2019.

  • Expleo Solutions Ltd closes trading window from April 1, 2026
  • Trading window to remain closed till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Closure in accordance with the Code of Conduct to regulate, monitor, and report trading by insiders
  • Action taken pursuant to SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Closure effective until 48 hours after the declaration of Financial Results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Expleo Solutions Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GUJAPOLLO] Gujarat Apollo Industries Ltd. Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Gujarat Apollo Industries Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will commence from April 1, 2026, and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the announcement of audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This decision is in compliance with the provisions of sub-regulation (1) of Regulation 9 of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the terms of the Company's Code of Conduct.

  • Trading window closure for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026
  • Closure to remain in effect until 48 hours after the announcement of audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
  • Compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Applies to all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives of the Company
  • Designated Persons advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT APOLLO INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SPSINT] VK Global Industries Ltd: No Requests for Physical Shares Re-lodgement in February 2026
item.description:
VK Global Industries Ltd has reported no requests for re-lodgement of transfer requests of physical shares during the period from 5th February 2026 to 28th February 2026. This is in accordance with the SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97, dated July 02, 2025, and HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026, dated January 30, 2026. The company has not received, processed, approved, or rejected any requests during this period. The average time taken for processing of requests, which is not applicable this month, is usually provided in the monthly updates.

  • No requests for re-lodgement of transfer requests of physical shares in February 2026
  • Compliance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97 and HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026
  • No requests received, processed, approved, or rejected during the month

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SPS INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [TREL] Transindia Real Estate Ltd Independent Director, Mr. Vinit Prabhugaonkar, Resigns Due to Pre-occupation
item.description:
Transindia Real Estate Ltd announced that Mr. Vinit Prabhugaonkar has tendered his resignation as a Non-Executive, Independent Director, effective from the close of business hours on March 30, 2026. The resignation is due to his pre-occupation and other commitments. There are no material reasons for his resignation other than those mentioned in his resignation letter.

  • Mr. Vinit Prabhugaonkar has resigned as a Non-Executive, Independent Director from Transindia Real Estate Ltd.
  • The resignation is effective from the close of business hours on March 30, 2026.
  • The resignation is due to Mr. Prabhugaonkar's pre-occupation and other commitments.
  • There are no material reasons for his resignation other than those mentioned in his resignation letter.
  • Mr. Prabhugaonkar will also cease to be a member of the Committees of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Transindia Real Estate Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [COMFINTE] Comfort Intech Ltd Receives Provisional Attachment Order from Enforcement Directorate
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Comfort Intech Limited has received a Provisional Attachment Order from the Office of the Joint Director, Enforcement Directorate, Hyderabad. The order, issued under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002, pertains to certain assets/properties and is a result of an FIR registered in 2013 based on a complaint by Ravi Kumar Distilleries Ltd. The matter is currently sub-judice before the CB-CID Court in Hyderabad since 2020. The Company maintains a strong legal position and is taking appropriate steps to challenge the order. The attached assets have an approximate value of ₹13,07,59,308 for a period of 180 days from the date of the order. The Company is currently assessing the financial impact, but there is no material impact on the day-to-day operations at present.

  • Comfort Intech Ltd has received a Provisional Attachment Order from the Enforcement Directorate.
  • The order is issued under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002, and pertains to certain assets/properties.
  • The order is a result of an FIR registered in 2013 based on a complaint by Ravi Kumar Distilleries Ltd.
  • The Company maintains a strong legal position and is taking appropriate steps to challenge the order.
  • Assets with an approximate value of ₹13,07,59,308 have been provisionally attached for a period of 180 days from the date of the order.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: COMFORT INTECH LTD.-$ | Category: Legal

item.title: [FLOMIC] Flomic Global Logistics Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Consideration of Audited Financial Result
item.description:
Flomic Global Logistics Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for the purpose of considering the Audited Financial Result for the Fourth Quarter and Financial Year Ended 31st March, 2026. The closure will begin from 01st April, 2026 and will last until 48 hours after the Audited Financial Result becomes generally available to the public. This decision affects all Officers, Designated Employees, Directors, and Auditors of the company, who have been informed not to trade in the company's Equity Shares during the stated period.

  • Flomic Global Logistics Ltd to close trading window for consideration of Audited Financial Result
  • Closure begins from 01st April, 2026
  • Trading window to open 48 hours after the Audited Financial Result becomes public
  • Officers, Designated Employees, Directors, and Auditors advised not to trade during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Flomic Global Logistics Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PSPLATINA] Propshare Platina Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons Till April 03, 2026
item.description:
Property Share Investment Trust - Propshare Platina has announced the closure of the trading window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from the opening of business hours of BSE Limited on April 01, 2026, till the expiry of 48 hours post declaration of the audited financial results of PSPlatina for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Code on unpublished price sensitive information and dealing in securities of Property Share Investment Trust.

  • Propshare Platina has closed the trading window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will be in effect from the opening of business hours of BSE Limited on April 01, 2026.
  • The trading window will reopen 48 hours post declaration of the audited financial results of PSPlatina for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • This decision is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The announcement was made to keep the market informed about the unpublished price sensitive information.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Property Share Investment Trust - Propshare Platina | Category: Business Update
